title: Problem 3 вЂ” Pixar Parade: Polymorphism & instanceof
description:
Practice polymorphism by building a Pixar character hierarchy and
processing a mixed array of characters.

The abstract class `PixarCharacter` is PROVIDED as a support file.
You must create THREE subclasses and ONE static utility method.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
Provided (do not redefine):
  abstract class PixarCharacter
    вЂў private String name, movie
    вЂў Constructor(String name, String movie)
    вЂў getName(), getMovie()
    вЂў abstract String perform();
    вЂў toString() returns "<name> (<movie>)"
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

1. class Toy extends PixarCharacter
   вЂў private String owner
   вЂў Constructor(String name, String movie, String owner)
   вЂў String getOwner()
   вЂў String perform() в†’ "<name> comes to life and plays!"
   вЂў String getPlayed() в†’ "<name> is being played with by <owner>!"
   вЂў Override toString() в†’ "Toy: <name> (<movie>) вЂ” Owner: <owner>"

2. class Monster extends PixarCharacter
   вЂў private int scarePower  (1вЂ“10)
   вЂў Constructor(String name, String movie, int scarePower)
   вЂў int getScarePower()
   вЂў String perform() в†’ "<name> leaps out and roars!"
   вЂў String scare() в†’ "<name> scares with power <scarePower>!"
   вЂў Override toString() в†’ "Monster: <name> (<movie>) вЂ” Scare: <scarePower>"

3. class SuperPixar extends PixarCharacter
   вЂў private String power
   вЂў Constructor(String name, String movie, String power)
   вЂў String getPower()
   вЂў String perform() в†’ "<name> strikes a heroic pose!"
   вЂў String save() в†’ "<name> saves the day with <power>!"
   вЂў Override toString() в†’ "Super: <name> (<movie>) вЂ” Power: <power>"

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
4. Static utility method (inside a class called ParadeUtils):

   public static String runParade(PixarCharacter[] cast)

   This method loops through the array and builds a multi-line
   String (use StringBuilder or string concatenation) as follows:
     вЂў For EACH character, append a line:  character.toString()
     вЂў For EACH character, append a line:  character.perform()
     вЂў Keep a count of how many Toys, Monsters, and Supers are present.
     вЂў After the loop, append a final summary line:
         "Parade: <x> toys, <y> monsters, <z> supers"
     вЂў Separate each line with "\n".
   Return the full assembled String.
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
HINTS
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў Make Toy, Monster, SuperPixar, and ParadeUtils package-private (no public keyword).
вЂў The public class in your file must be PixarCharacter вЂ” but it's already in
  the support file, so your file should NOT redeclare it. Start directly with
  the subclass definitions.
вЂў perform() is called polymorphically вЂ” the loop doesn't know the concrete type.
вЂў Only the summary counting needs instanceof.
